subject: eliinated refence to morganthau,, and accented sex slave , needs grammar review
body:
Barry, I'm sorry but as I am traveling in europe I did
not receive your e-mail until today. .  Yes it sounds
familiar, it reminds me of the Harley case , the one 
that you had previously sent to  me, but,this one is
even worse .I am  quite familiar with the case,
and in fact had considered sending it to you, but
didn't want to appear pedantic. Morganthau's office
said this was  clearly an easy case to bring as the
aggravating circumstances were so egregious. This case
is an unfortunately an  all too typical but not unique
case of sex slavery.  The man bought the two young
girls from their mother, coerced them into getting
tattoos of his name on their body ,( in order that
they be reminded that they were his" possession" along
with tatoos of his favorite other  possesions(car
horse,etc.)  
The welfare case worker acted both professionally and
appropriately in immediately 
notifiying the authorities, that this man,(until
yesterday  a fugitive  also charged with witness
bribery) with full
knowledge of the age of the victims, paid their
mother,( charged with pimping), who said "her
daughters
made money for her",, , to have sex with them, three
to
five times a week, , initially in different locations
and then in an apartment set aside for the purpose, 
for near five years..When the girls refused to go back
she allegedly forced them to return.He had  a specific
financial arrangement clearly  for full blown  sex  . 
and  full
knowledge, of their ages .It appears he had sexual
relations with  girls as
young as thirteen , pimped by their mother.This case
oviously  met  the 
well established high threshold required to bring
these types of charges. In comparison as the facts in
my case are so 
clearly distinguishable ,if I may remind you: There
are no aggravating cirumstances,(Dahlia suggested"
volume") all of the girls were over age , except  a
very small number, who   lied about their age,and
apparently  were able to get through,.OF the many
girls interviewed, except for what we  now agree seems
to have been from a girl of totally unreliable
character , the girls had said that no sexual
intercourse , vaginal or oral, was even attempted, and
no coercion , drugs, or alcohol was even suggested(
the "volume",  in fact supports this) The allegation
of the one underage girl to which you referred 
previously has not been made known to us,  but at
worst case would be a one-time event with no    sexual
vaginal , anal , or oral intercourse. At it's very
worst , a case similar to the fifteen year old
stripper that you and I discussed at our first
meeting.A case you said" you would never charge".   
These set of facts stand in  stark contrast to those
in the two cases presented to us ( we have been unable
to find the "elderly "case )and should be able to 
provide to   you
both comfort and   reassurance , that the  only fair
decision, I beleive,  in my case ,would be for you to
thoughtfully  execute your discretion ,based  on
precedent, judgement of the credibility of both your 
witnesses and their allegations, keeping in mind  your
firm 
policy that  the punishment should equal the harm,
and to make the  carefully reasoned decision   not to 
 bring charges in this case. Considering all the
facts, 
I am  firmly  convinced that  this is the right thing
to do.    I you like I
can make myself available , by phone , for the rest of
the
week, or if you prefer, come to see you , and your
assistants  anytime next
week. 
                           With great respect 








__________________________________________________
Do You Yahoo!?

http://mail.yahoo.com
